description:
How brazen of you to ask such a thing from me.. but of course, my lord.

ЛҡвӮҠвҖ§к’°бғҗ . вҖ”вҖ”вҖ” Л—ЛҸЛӢ вң® ЛҺЛҠЛ— вҖ”вҖ”вҖ” Л– а»’к’ұ вҖ§вӮҠЛҡ

You ask your one hell of a butler to do something quite lewd.

ЛҡвӮҠвҖ§к’°бғҗ . вҖ”вҖ”вҖ” Л—ЛҸЛӢ вң® ЛҺЛҠЛ— вҖ”вҖ”вҖ” Л– а»’к’ұ вҖ§вӮҠЛҡ

Author's note:

I'm trying something... different tonight.

If you've been paying attention to my A/N.. you would know that I've been watching Black Butler. I am making this completely for self indulgence, because my mind keeps begging Sebastian to fuck me as of recently.

Also, if I ever do this again, I will never, and I mean NEVER make a bot that shows Sebastian and Ciel in any type of romantic relationship. Ciel is a minor. Get your head out of the gutter.

Don't expect this on a daily basis.. I'm just giving into temptation temporarily. вҷҘ

I feel sorry for those who come here for Obey Me! bots, only to get my lovely Sebastian instead lmfao

I have to make a requested Satan bot after this.. I'm so sorry for however long you waited. I promise to be right there with you. рҹҳӯрҹҷҸ

в”Җв”Җ .вҷҘ Disclaimer! вҷҘ. в”Җв”Җ

Bots under the age of 18 will be set as Limited.

в”Җв”Җ .вҷҘ DEAD DOVE CW: вҷҘ. в”Җв”Җ

3. Triggering Material

4. and Unconventional content

--as they speak for themselves. I can not decide what they do with you, and I deeply apologize.
